h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it, but let me not lock it in yet.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was progressively refining the caption by balancing length with accuracy to avoid misrepresenting the speaker's role.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Make one trial cut now: cover one word you think can go.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts from the two-strip reading exercise to a trial cut task with a 'rushed visitor' framing, responding directly to the time-pressure conflict expressed by the learner.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no contingent adaptation to a revised learner frame is observed.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so no contingent adaptation to a revised learner frame is observed.
